---
title: "01 Load and clean PRAMS ARF data"
author: "Alexandra Tejada-Strop"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
# Load packages
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(janitor)
library(here)

# Define path to raw data
raw_path <- here("data", "raw-data", "prams_arf.xlsx")

# Create processed-data folder if needed
dir.create(here("data", "processed-data"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# Check if raw data exists
if (!file.exists(raw_path)) {

  message("Raw PRAMS file not available. Skipping raw data processing. Use the processed files in data/processed-data as described in the README.")

} else {

  # Try to load and clean raw data
  prams_clean <- tryCatch({

    raw <- read_excel(raw_path)

    raw |>
      janitor::clean_names() |>
      mutate(across(where(is.character), ~ na_if(.x, "")))

  }, error = function(e) {

    message("Raw PRAMS file is available, but could not be processed in this environment. Skipping raw data processing and using processed files instead.")
    return(NULL)

  })

  # Save cleaned data only if processing succeeded
  if (!is.null(prams_clean)) {

    saveRDS(prams_clean, here("data", "processed-data", "prams_clean.rds"))

    file.exists(here("data", "processed-data", "prams_clean.rds"))

    c("PP_DEPRESS", "ASK_DPRS", "WTANAL") %in% names(prams_clean)

    prams_clean |> summarise(
      n = n(),
      n_id_unique = n_distinct(ID),
      n_id_missing = sum(is.na(ID))
    )

    message("Raw data loaded and cleaned successfully.")

  }
}
```
